title: Oculus For Simple Clouds - NEW LOGO
description: This mod adds full compatibility between SimpleClouds’ shader renderer and Oculus’ shader system, ensuring both work together seamlessly.
body:
## ⚠️ This mod is not finished

This project will introduce a compatibility bridge between **Oculus** and **SimpleClouds** shader systems.  
Only shaders that I explicitly adapt will function with it. You will **not** be able to use arbitrary shaders.

### ❓ Does this work with Project Atmosphere?  
Absolutely.

### ❓ Can you request support for a specific shader?  
Possibly. To add compatibility, **both conditions must be met**:  
1. The shader’s **source code must be publicly available**.  
2. I must have the **legal right to republish** the modified version.  

This means shaders like **SEUS** cannot be supported.


### ❓ Does this modify Oculus’ code?

Yes and no.

The mod applies **Mixins** to Oculus at runtime to create the compatibility layer, but **no Oculus code is bundled** or redistributed.  
You **still need to install Oculus separately** for this mod to work.
## 📌 More by Gabou
